name: GetDiagnostics

path.description: Optional path to read diagnostics for. If not provided, returns diagnostics for all files.

description: Read and display linter errors and diagnostics from the current workspace. Returns errors, warnings, and hints from language servers and linters.
description_zh: 读取并显示来自当前工作区的linter错误和诊断信息。返回来自语言服务器和linter的错误、警告和提示。
examples: Get all diagnostics: path=null or omit
examples_zh: 获取所有诊断: path=null或省略
